description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a modern industrial design, featuring a sturdy gray metal frame and five evenly spaced wooden shelves. The frame consists of two vertical side supports connected by horizontal bars at the top and bottom, providing structural stability. Each shelf is made of light-colored wood, contrasting with the darker metal frame, and is open on all sides, allowing easy access from the front and sides. The back of the unit appears to have a dark panel or support running vertically, adding further rigidity. The top of the frame includes a rectangular handle-like structure, possibly for ease of movement or aesthetic balance. This shelving unit is suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor patios, where it can store tools, plants, or other items.
description: A tall, narrow shelving unit with a gray metal frame and five light wood shelves, open on all sides and reinforced with a dark back panel. Its modern industrial style makes it ideal for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from the narrow side, showing the depth of the shelves and the rectangular top handle.
description_view_1: The shelving unit is viewed from the wide front, displaying all five shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_2: The shelving unit is seen from the opposite narrow side, mirroring view 0 with visible shelf depth and top handle.
description_view_3: The shelving unit is viewed from the back, showing the dark vertical support panel and the open shelf structure.
